roa.docketEntryComment: CONFIDENTIAL Petition for Revocation of PRCS PC 3455, PC 1203.2
Agreement and Order Releasing Defendant on Own Recognizance
Pre-Sentenced Defendant Electronic Monitoring Release with Coordinated Pickup

/CAL:PETITION TO REVOKE POST RELEASE COMMUNITY SUPERVISION PURSUANT TO PC3455/X:JUDGE TORPOCO AND DA AND COURT REPORTER VIA ZOOM/DEF: AND PD IN THECOURTROOM/DEF:ADMITTED PRCS VIOLATION ON LIMITED BASIS/3455ADV/3455ADM/3455REIN/X:AND MODIFIED AS FOLLOWS=/CH1:CJ41D/CTS:41D/4019HALF/DEF: WITH 10 DAYS CTS WITH HALF TIME CREDITS AND DEFENDNAT RECEIVED 21 DAYS CTS FROM HIS 21 DAYS IN HOME DETENTION FOR A TOTAL OF 41 DAYS/X:COMPLY WITH APD'S INDIVIDUALIZED TREATMENT PLAN & MAINTAIN CONTACT WITH APD/DEF:ON PRCS UNTIL08-28-2022/EMTERM/

/CAL:PETITION TO REVOKE POST RELEASE COMMUNITY SUPERVISION PURSUANT TO PC3455/X:JUDGE TORPOCO AND DA AND COURT REPORTER VIA ZOOM/DEF: AND PD IN THECOURTROOM/DEF:ADMITTED PRCS VIOLATION ON LIMITED BASIS/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT ON APD 3455 PC (PRCS)/PD/27    FTO SET APD 3455/WIAPRCS//CTORD: PRCS REVOKED/OR/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALLBE PLACED ON HOME DETENTION PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALLTERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,//CONTD:TO SET APD 3455/DOP/
